message.content:
@startuml
title Skava Integration - Order Replaced Completed

box "Skava AWS" #LightGray
participant "Skava Event\nOrchestration" as SEO
end box

box "Kafka" #LightCyan
participant "Topics" as Topics
end box

box "YL Services" #LightBlue
participant "Order Sync Service" as OSS
end box

database "Legacy DB" as LegacyDB

SEO -> Topics : 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message

note over Topics, OSS : **Async**

Topics -> OSS : 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message
OSS -> LegacyDB : 3 Update order status in legacy db
LegacyDB --> OSS : 4 Response/Order ID
OSS -> Topics : 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message

note over Topics, OSS : **Async**

Topics -> SEO : 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message

box "Skava AWS" #LightGray
participant "Skava Event\nOrchestration" as SEO2
end box

box "Kafka" #LightCyan
participant "Topics" as Topics2
end box

box "YL Services" #LightBlue
participant "Order Sync Service" as OSS2
end box

database "Legacy DB" as LegacyDB2

@enduml
